Scripting plugin for Adobe Illustrator by Juerg Lehni, defunct since 2012 (Paper.js was informed by Scriptographer)
JS library for InDesign - does it qualify?

This was a plugin that was released with Photoshop 3.0 which allowed to write filters using a very limited instruction set. In hindsight one could say it was the predecessor or what ShaderToy is now. Around this plugin a very active community of coders had gathered in a mailing list called "The Filter Factory Discussion Group" which was originally started on Compuserve in 1995. During the ~4 years in which the group was most active thousands of experimental filters were shared that went beyond basic color manipulations but rather tried to push the language and memory limits that the plugin imposed. Lots of the code shared I would definitely call "Generative Art".
